title: taraxacum centrasiaticum
intro: Taraxacum centrasiaticum, also known as Central Asian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum centrasiaticum include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and the improvement of liver and kidney function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum centrasiaticum are commonly made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
